title: AggregatedPortfolioMirrorTotals
description: Aggregated totals for a copy-trading mirror.

mirrorNetFunding.description: Net amount funded into the mirror: mirrorDepositTotal minus mirrorWithdrawalTotal.

mirrorPositionsPnl.description: Total P&L from open and closed positions within the mirror, in account currency.

mirrorPositionsPnlPercent.description: mirrorPositionsPnl as a percentage of mirrorLiquidationValue.

mirrorMarginPercent.description: This mirror's active margin as a percentage of the account's total used margin.

mirrorValuePercent.description: This mirror's liquidation value as a percentage of the account's total value.

mirrorActiveMargin.description: Total margin in active use within this mirror: mirrorAvailableCash + sum of position margins minus closed positions P&L.
